message.content:
Revise double-precision hyperbolic and basic rounding test files (Groups 7+8a) to match test_sinf.c structure.

Reference file (for structure): /home/nick/work/picolibc_agentic/libm/machine/riscv/test/test_sinf.c

Group 7 - Hyperbolic (3 files in /home/nick/work/picolibc_agentic/libm/machine/riscv/test/):
- test_sinh.c
- test_cosh.c
- test_tanh.c

Group 8a - Basic Rounding (7 files):
- test_ceil.c
- test_floor.c
- test_trunc.c
- test_round.c
- test_rint.c
- test_lrint.c
- test_lround.c

For each file, implement all 8 test sections with double-precision handling.

Special bit patterns (double, uint64_t):
- qNaN: 0x7ff8000000000000ULL, sNaN: 0x7ff0000000000001ULL, -NaN: 0xfff8000000000000ULL
- ±Inf: 0x7ff0000000000000ULL, 0xfff0000000000000ULL
- Denorms: min/mid/max variants

Function-specific from plan:
- **sinh/cosh/tanh**: overflow threshold ~88.7 for sinh/cosh, tanh saturation near ±4
- **Rounding functions**: Hard cases 0.5 exactly, n+0.5 for various n, large integers
- **exhaustive_small**: [0, 10] for rounding functions (appropriate step size per function)

Each file should have all 8 sections matching test_sinf.c structure exactly.

content.text:
Excellent! All files have been comprehensively revised. Let me create a summary of what was done:

## Summary

Revised 10 double-precision math test files to match the exact 8-section structure of `test_sinf.c`:

### Group 7 - Hyperbolic Functions (3 files):
- **test_sinh.c**, **test_cosh.c**, **test_tanh.c**
  - All 8 sections: special values, tiny values, known mathematical values, large arguments, critical thresholds (overflow near ±88.7 for sinh/cosh; saturation near ±4 for tanh), hard cases, sweep [0, 100] in 100 steps, exhaustive small [0, 10] in 200 steps
  - Special bit patterns for NaN: qNaN (0x7ff8000000000000ULL), sNaN (0x7ff0000000000001ULL), -NaN (0xfff8000000000000ULL)
  - Infinity: ±Inf (0x7ff0000000000000ULL, 0xfff0000000000000ULL)

### Group 8a - Basic Rounding Functions (7 files):
- **test_ceil.c**, **test_floor.c**, **test_trunc.c**, **test_round.c**, **test_rint.c**
  - All 8 sections: special values, tiny values, half-way cases (0.5, n+0.5), large arguments, boundary conditions, hard fractional cases, sweep [0, 10] in 100 steps, exhaustive small [0, 10] in 200 steps
  - Comprehensive testing of edge cases: 0.5 exactly, ±0.5, integer transitions

- **test_lrint.c**, **test_lround.c** (return long integers)
  - All 8 sections: special values, tiny values, half-way cases, large arguments, boundary values (near LONG_MAX/LONG_MIN), hard fractional cases, sweep [0, 10] in 100 steps, exhaustive small [0, 10] in 200 steps
  - Special handling for overflow conditions and boundary testing

Each file now:
- Includes build/test harness header comments
- Has all 8 test sections called from main()
- Emits (input_hex, output_hex) pairs for comparison testing
- Uses consistent struct naming and layout
- Provides comprehensive double-precision bit patterns and edge case coverage

Files modified: `/home/nick/work/picolibc_agentic/libm/machine/riscv/test/{test_sinh.c, test_cosh.c, test_tanh.c, test_ceil.c, test_floor.c, test_trunc.c, test_round.c, test_rint.c, test_lrint.c, test_lround.c}`
